summary: Closed dashboard accessibility full-pass wave with route-level smoke tests, semantic remediations, and documented manual-checklist evidence.

manualChecklist.name: Keyboard-only top navigation sanity (dashboard shell + menu toggle + route actions)
manualChecklist.evidence: Header responsive regression and route-level interactive-name assertions.

manualChecklist.name: Screen-reader context for breadcrumb and create actions
manualChecklist.evidence: PageTitle a11y tests verify breadcrumb navigation landmark and contextual action description.

manualChecklist.name: Core route semantic heading baseline
manualChecklist.evidence: Dashboard/Bots/Wallets accessibility smoke asserts single primary heading and labeled landmarks.
